settings.title: Niri Screensaver
settings.description: TerminalTextEffects screensaver wired into Noctalia's IdleService. Settings here write to ~/.config/niri-screensaver/config and update the idle hook automatically.
settings.cli-missing.title: niri-screensaver CLI not found on PATH
settings.cli-missing.desc: Install the bash side from https://github.com/jfreed-dev/niri-screensaver (run ./install.sh) and reload the plugin. Without it, the launch / kill commands below have nothing to drive.
settings.enabled-desc: Register this screensaver in Noctalia's idle hook list.
settings.idle-seconds-desc: Idle time before the screensaver activates.
settings.battery-min-percent-desc: When on battery and the charge is below this percentage, skip auto-launch to save power. 0 disables the check. Plugged in or no battery present never skips; a manual Trigger now is also gated by this.
settings.include-effects-desc: Restrict to this comma-separated list of TerminalTextEffects names. Empty = all available.
settings.exclude-effects-desc: Skip these effects. Ignored when Include is non-empty.
settings.fade-in-desc: Optional one-shot effect played when the screensaver appears.
settings.fade-out-desc: Optional one-shot effect played when the screensaver dismisses.
settings.multi-monitor-desc: With more than one display: Independent shows a different random effect per monitor; Mirror shows the same effect on all of them (best on matched resolutions).
settings.random-logo-desc: Pick a different logo from the Logo directory before each effect cycle.
settings.logo-dir-desc: Override the bundled logo directory. Leave empty to use the installed share/logos/.
settings.logo-path-desc: Pick a specific logo to display. "Default" lets the driver seed the bundled default. Disabled when Random is on.
settings.show-clock-desc: Display the current time briefly between effect cycles.
settings.show-now-playing-desc: When a playerctl-compatible player is Playing, display the current track briefly between effect cycles. Silently skips when playerctl is missing or nothing is playing.
settings.now-playing-duration-desc: How long to display the track name before the next effect.
